news.title:
PNB's advances rose 12.2% YoY to Rs 11.96T in FY26, outpacing deposits.
Central Bank and PNB achieved double-digit credit growth, deposits grew 9.1% YoY.
news.summary:
PNB's advances rose 12.2% YoY to Rs 11.96T in FY26, outpacing deposits.
Central Bank and PNB achieved double-digit credit growth, deposits grew 9.1% YoY.

news.title:
Central Bank of India's Q4 FY25-26 business grew 15.7% YoY to ₹812,814 crore.
Total deposits rose 13.4% YoY to ₹467,885 crore; gross advances up 18.9% YoY to ₹344,929 crore.
news.summary:
Central Bank of India's Q4 FY25-26 business grew 15.7% YoY to ₹812,814 crore.
Total deposits rose 13.4% YoY to ₹467,885 crore; gross advances up 18.9% YoY to ₹344,929 crore.

news.title:
Central Bank of India disclosed under SEBI regulations that its promoter, President of India, holds 89.27% equity shares as of March 31, 2026.
The promoter and persons acting in concert made no encumbrances on shares during FY 2025-26.
news.summary:
Central Bank of India disclosed under SEBI regulations that its promoter, President of India, holds 89.27% equity shares as of March 31, 2026.
The promoter and persons acting in concert made no encumbrances on shares during FY 2025-26.

news.title:
Central Bank of India received a Rs 296.1-cr tax demand notice from IT Dept for FY25.
The bank plans to challenge the order, expecting no financial impact on operations.
news.summary:
Central Bank of India received a Rs 296.1-cr tax demand notice from IT Dept for FY25.
The bank plans to challenge the order, expecting no financial impact on operations.

news.title:
RBI penalized Bank of India, Central Bank of India, Union Bank, and Pine Labs for non-compliance.
Penalties imposed: Rs 95.4L on BOI, Rs 63.6L on CBI, Rs 58.5L on UBI, Rs 3.1L on Pine Labs.
news.summary:
RBI penalized Bank of India, Central Bank of India, Union Bank, and Pine Labs for non-compliance.
Penalties imposed: Rs 95.4L on BOI, Rs 63.6L on CBI, Rs 58.5L on UBI, Rs 3.1L on Pine Labs.

news.title:
RBI fined Bank of India ₹58.5L for PSL, deposit rate violations; Central Bank ₹63.6L for KYC lapses.
Bank of India shares fell 3% to ₹144.99, Central Bank shares dropped 3.3% to ₹33.01 on NSE.
news.summary:
RBI fined Bank of India ₹58.5L for PSL, deposit rate violations; Central Bank ₹63.6L for KYC lapses.
Bank of India shares fell 3% to ₹144.99, Central Bank shares dropped 3.3% to ₹33.01 on NSE.

news.title:
RBI fined Central Bank of India Rs. 63.6 lakh for KYC, savings norms violations.
Penalty imposed under Banking Regulation Act 1949; disclosed per SEBI rules.
news.summary:
RBI fined Central Bank of India Rs. 63.6 lakh for KYC, savings norms violations.
Penalty imposed under Banking Regulation Act 1949; disclosed per SEBI rules.

news.title:
Central Bank of India trades at 0.8x its book value, showing strong loan growth of 21.1% YoY in Q3FY26.
Net profit rose 31.7% YoY to Rs 1,262.6 crore; NPA provisions fell and asset quality improved.
news.summary:
Central Bank of India trades at 0.8x its book value, showing strong loan growth of 21.1% YoY in Q3FY26.
Net profit rose 31.7% YoY to Rs 1,262.6 crore; NPA provisions fell and asset quality improved.

news.title:
Central Bank of India partners with IIFL Finance for co-lending.
The collaboration aims to enhance credit availability and financial inclusion.
news.summary:
Central Bank of India partners with IIFL Finance for co-lending.
The collaboration aims to enhance credit availability and financial inclusion.

news.title:
Central Bank of India renews co-lending partnership with Capri Global Capital Ltd for competitive loans.
Capri Global, an NBFC with Rs.23,916 Cr AUM, will originate and service loans under this arrangement.
news.summary:
Central Bank of India renews co-lending partnership with Capri Global Capital Ltd for competitive loans.
Capri Global, an NBFC with Rs.23,916 Cr AUM, will originate and service loans under this arrangement.

news.title:
Central Bank of India stock fell 4.4% on Mar 4, closing at 37.07.
The decline continues due to sector weakness and underperformance versus benchmarks.
news.summary:
Central Bank of India stock fell 4.4% on Mar 4, closing at 37.07.
The decline continues due to sector weakness and underperformance versus benchmarks.

news.title:
Central Bank of India gets CCI nod to acquire 1.09% stake in GCICL.
Bank also approved to acquire 0.82% stake in GCLICL.
news.summary:
Central Bank of India gets CCI nod to acquire 1.09% stake in GCICL.
Bank also approved to acquire 0.82% stake in GCLICL.

news.title:
CCI approved Central Bank of India's equity hike in two insurance firms.
Bank's stake to rise to 26% in Generali Central Insurance & Life.
news.summary:
CCI approved Central Bank of India's equity hike in two insurance firms.
Bank's stake to rise to 26% in Generali Central Insurance & Life.

news.title:
Central Bank of India partners with SBI Funds Management for mutual fund distribution, expanding customer investment options.
Central Bank's stock traded at Rs 38.3 on BSE with an intraday high of Rs 38.6 and a net turnover of Rs 1.77 crore.
news.summary:
Central Bank of India partners with SBI Funds Management for mutual fund distribution, expanding customer investment options.
Central Bank's stock traded at Rs 38.3 on BSE with an intraday high of Rs 38.6 and a net turnover of Rs 1.77 crore.

news.title:
Central Bank of India reports a proposed strike on 12th February 2026 by AIBEA, BEFI, and AIBOA.
The bank assures smooth functioning of branches/offices as per existing guidelines during the strike.
news.summary:
Central Bank of India reports a proposed strike on 12th February 2026 by AIBEA, BEFI, and AIBOA.
The bank assures smooth functioning of branches/offices as per existing guidelines during the strike.

news.title:
Central Bank of India signed a distribution agreement with HSBC Asset Management (India) for mutual fund products.
This partnership offers customers access to HSBC AMC's mutual funds, with a daily average AUM of Rs.1.39 lakh crore in Dec 2025.
news.summary:
Central Bank of India signed a distribution agreement with HSBC Asset Management (India) for mutual fund products.
This partnership offers customers access to HSBC AMC's mutual funds, with a daily average AUM of Rs.1.39 lakh crore in Dec 2025.

news.title:
PSU banks like Punjab & Sind Bank, UCO Bank, Bank of Maharashtra, IOB, and Central Bank of India reported strong Q3FY26 results, driven by profit growth and rising net interest income.
Key highlights: IOB's net profit surged 56%, Bank of Maharashtra's by 27%, and Central Bank of India's by 31%, boosting investor sentiment.
news.summary:
PSU banks like Punjab & Sind Bank, UCO Bank, Bank of Maharashtra, IOB, and Central Bank of India reported strong Q3FY26 results, driven by profit growth and rising net interest income.
Key highlights: IOB's net profit surged 56%, Bank of Maharashtra's by 27%, and Central Bank of India's by 31%, boosting investor sentiment.

news.title:
Corporate credit demand rebounds in Q3, with 13 banks reporting 10.6% YoY growth in lending, up from 8% in Q2.
PSU and mid-sized banks saw sharper growth; Central Bank of India led with 23.2% YoY growth, followed by RBL at 16.5%.
news.summary:
Corporate credit demand rebounds in Q3, with 13 banks reporting 10.6% YoY growth in lending, up from 8% in Q2.
PSU and mid-sized banks saw sharper growth; Central Bank of India led with 23.2% YoY growth, followed by RBL at 16.5%.

news.title:
Central Bank of India announced CRISIL reaffirmed its credit ratings, with AA (Stable) for corporate credit and Basel III bonds.
Proposed Tier I and Certificate of Deposits worth Rs 1000 Cr and Rs 10000 Cr rated AA (Stable) and A1 respectively, reaffirmed.
news.summary:
Central Bank of India announced CRISIL reaffirmed its credit ratings, with AA (Stable) for corporate credit and Basel III bonds.
Proposed Tier I and Certificate of Deposits worth Rs 1000 Cr and Rs 10000 Cr rated AA (Stable) and A1 respectively, reaffirmed.

news.title:
Central Bank of India reports Q3 PAT up 32%, showcasing growth.
Improvements seen in CASA, NIM recovery, and strong ROA performance.
news.summary:
Central Bank of India reports Q3 PAT up 32%, showcasing growth.
Improvements seen in CASA, NIM recovery, and strong ROA performance.
